ksa_text: Skill in drafting and reviewing data processing agreements, including controller-processor terms, sub-processor obligations, cross-border transfer provisions, and regulatory compliance clauses.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-S-010 (Risk and Compliance/Skill) excluded as edge_case (composite 0.413, highest: EU AI Act at 0.413). Domain prior: edge. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. Data quality framework management, DQ metrics/profiling/monitoring, quality rules, remediation oversight, and cross-functional quality standards at a manager level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with edge_case classification, composite 0.413, and Risk and Compliance (RC) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Risk and Compliance KSA (composite 0.413)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Data Quality Manager job postings does not surface this Risk and Compliance competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
